inputs.label: Oil Barrels
inputs.businessContext: The number of oil barrels to convert. Standard oil barrel is 42 US gallons.

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of oil barrels to convert. Standard oil barrel is 42 US gallons.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüştürülecek petrol varili sayısı. Standart petrol varili 42 ABD galonudur.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der umzurechnenden Ölfässer. Standard-Ölfass = 42 US-Gallonen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le nombre de barils de pétrole à convertir. Le baril standard de pétrole est de 42 gallons US.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de barriles de petróleo a convertir. El barril estándar de petróleo es de 42 galones US.

inputs.label: Observed Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature at which the volume is measured.

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature at which the volume is measured.
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperatur, bei der das Volumen gemessen wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température à laquelle le volume est mesuré.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura a la que se mide el volumen.

inputs.label: Reference Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Reference temperature for standard volume (typically 15°C or 60°F).

businessContext_i18n.en: Reference temperature for standard volume (typically 15°C or 60°F).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart hacim için referans sıcaklık (genellikle 15°C veya 60°F).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température de référence pour le volume standard (généralement 15°C ou 60°F).
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura de referencia para volumen estándar (normalmente 15°C o 60°F).

inputs.label: Thermal Expansion Coefficient
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient of volumetric thermal expansion for the oil. Typical range for crude oil: 0.0006 to 0.0008 per °C.

businessContext_i18n.en: Coefficient of volumetric thermal expansion for the oil. Typical range for crude oil: 0.0006 to 0.0008 per °C.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Petrol için hacimsel termal genleşme katsayısı. Ham petrol için tipik aralık: °C başına 0,0006 ila 0,0008.
businessContext_i18n.de: Volumenausdehnungskoeffizient des Öls. Typischer Bereich für Rohöl: 0,0006 bis 0,0008 pro °C.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de dilatation thermique volumique du pétrole. Plage typique pour le pétrole brut : 0,0006 à 0,0008 par °C.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente de expansión térmica volumétrica del petróleo. Rango típico para crudo: 0.0006 a 0.0008 por °C.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the output.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Ausgabe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour le résultat.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para la salida.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
